The [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] '''XJ5 X-wing starfighter''', more commonly known as the '''ChaseX''', was a model of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used during the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]]-[[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[Swarm War|conflict]] by the [[New Jedi Order]] and the [[Reconstruction Authority Space Patrol|Galactic Reconstruction Police]]. It had numerous improvements to its weapons and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] over the [[T-65XJ3 X-wing starfighter]]. XJ5 X-wings were later used by the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] and were stationed onboard the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']].

{{Ship-stub}}
